feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Create link between Handling Unit and Inbound Delivery through API
entry.content:
Hi how to link through api inbound Delivery number with Handling Unit?
Handling Unit was created through API with custom numbering. Wanted to add refrenceDocumentNumber (Inbound Delivery) The HU was created but the added Inbound Delivery number not.

Tried to create an Handling Unit item with the same refrenceDocumentNumber and refrenceDocumentNumberItem but API error says the parent Handling Unit has no refrenceDocumentNumber.

What is the process link Inbound Delivery and Handling Unit through API?

entry.title: Create link between Handling Unit and Inbound Delivery through API part2
entry.content:
Hi how to link through api inbound Delivery number with Handling Unit?
Handling Unit was created through API with custom numbering. Wanted to add refrenceDocumentNumber (Inbound Delivery) The HU was created but the added Inbound Delivery number not.

Tried to create an Handling Unit item with the same refrenceDocumentNumber and refrenceDocumentNumberItem but API error says the parent Handling Unit has no refrenceDocumentNumber.

What is the process link Inbound Delivery and Handling Unit through API?

entry.title: RF scanner loading carrier confirmation
entry.content:
Hello, 

When confirming multiple loading carriers during the goods receipt, the scanner awaits weight input for only 1 load carrier. 

As shown in the picture , 2 half pallets ( stacked on the euro pallet ) and 1 euro pallets are being confirmed. 

Why does the system not add up the weight of all loading carriers being confirmed?

if additional customizing has to be done to fix this please let me know. 

thanks in advance!

entry.title: EWM - Queue Type CDS View?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working at a client that is a distribution center. We wish to group all outbound queues based on the method of transportation, LTL, Small Parcel, and FTL. We wish to use this grouping through Queue Type.

Unfortunately, I don't believe there is any released queries that has data from Queue Type. Has anyone found an alternative to this?

entry.title: Report to update PGI status in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good Day

We have a strange outbound delivery status in SAP EWM decentral 9.5 system.

The delivery belongs to year 2020, PGI completed, ECC status updated. Shipment invoicing, payments completed.

Now in EWM if we see the delivery status is Partially completed.

Due to which for planners the delivery is appearing in their due list.

We want to close this delivery or set the PGI status to completed.

I tried multiple ways to use Process code, /scwm/CHM_LOG and tried updating status, but nothing worked for me.

Can you please help to close this delivery, if there is any report or FM available using which we can close / update the status of old deliveries?

This EWM Decentral 9.5 system.

Thanks,

Hari.

@sapewm

EWM - Delivery Processing EWM - Goods Movement

entry.title: "Set Ready for Shipping" Warehouse Monitor
entry.content:
Hello,

the function "Set Ready for Shipping" in the warehouse monitor doesn't work.

Error Message see below.

Are there any settings to perform to use these functionality?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: Third party Stock
entry.content: Please, Somedody knows how Do I lanch in Accounting Third party in my company wit the same value of invoice?

entry.title: Verification Feilds in Mobile Data Entry/RFUI
entry.content:
Hi,

We have Created one validation profile for the Putaway process in RFUI to verify only the Material and Destination Bin. Though, this validation is in active we are still getting error to Verify batch as Error.

 

Kindly do the needful,

Thanks,

Saikumar

entry.title: Decimals not allowed for the product unit quantity (matl 1000103, batch 1000001604) error /SCWM/PRDI
entry.content:
I want to goods receipt to EWM with the material using a batch-specific unit of measure, so i got an error message; Decimals not allowed for the product unit quantity (matl 1000103, batch 1000001604) in /SCWM/PRDI screen also inbound delivery is blocked. 

Some details of the material; 

Is there any SAP note published for this problem? How can I solve this error?

entry.title: WAVE RELEASE based on DELIVERY CREATION DATE or PLANNED SHIP DATE in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good day.

We have a requirement related to WAVE RELEASE based on DELIVERY CREATION date or PLANNED SHIP DATE.

My 1st question related to standard SAP EWM behavior, Wave release criteria confusion based on SAP F1 definition.

According to above, wave release should happen based on “yard departure date”,  below is our example:

Delivery created date 11/07/2024 / 14:00:04

Yard departure date. 11/08/2024

Planned GI on 11/08/2024

Wave Template, release days 0.

Wave release date  11/07/2024 / 15.01.00

As per standard behavior the Wave release date calculation is updating a day prior(yard date -1 day) to actual departure date form the yard, which is confusing, why it is taking -1 day?

Some other cases:

Ex 1: wave creation date 11-06-2024 and departure date from yard is 11-07-2024 release date is updated 11-06-2024  and wave got released on release date 11-06-2024 release time 15:01:00 as per wave template 

Ex 2: wave creation date 11-06-2024 and departure date from yard is 11-08-2024 release date is updated 11-07-2024 and wave would release on 11-07-2024 at 15:01:00

Ex 3: wave creation date 11-06-2024 and departure date from yard is 11-13-2024 release date is updated 11-07-2024 and wave would release on 11-12-2024 at 15:01:00 

 

Question 1 is: Why system taking Yard date -1 day for release?

Question 2 : If we want the wave release based on  DELIVERY CREATION date or PLANNED SHIP DATE any options available?

Kindly help to achieve this solution or to understand exact wave release logic.

Thanks,

Hari

 SAP Extended Warehouse Management SAP Community SAP Knowledge Warehouse 

@sapewm @Pr_Si

entry.title: Unplanned Goods issue cant be posted against Network/operation in /SCWM/ADGI
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to post unplanned goods issue against Network/Operation from /SCWM/ADGI in SAP EWM but there is no option to post against network.

There is only option for Cost center, Order and WBS element.

Also we cant even import Network/operations from ERP to EWM via report /SCWM/RACC_IMP_ERP_U.

Can anyone suggest any note/corrections so that we can post goods issue against Network from SAP EWM.

entry.title: Configuring reciever port for outbound IDOC
entry.content:
Hello all,

Here I am facing with an issue about outbound IDOC's. Our customer has copied their P system to Q. After that some configurations were done for rfcs,idocs etc. But currently IDOCS are not working. 

I got a general error message when i checked we02 

''IDoc could not be processed without errors''

I have digged a little bit and find out the reciever port was not determined properly.

On Q, I got this ( please see the attached image) but normally it should be A00000X. I have already checked we20 and we21. everything looks same as P system.

Can someone help me about this issue?

entry.title: Kanban stock Transfer Strategy using Warehouse request. (Different Kanban Status Sequence)
entry.content:
Hello There,

We are using newly released solution from SAP Embedded EWM on Kanban (A Stock Transfer with Warehouse Request.) With this all fine but we are looking forward to use different Kanban Status during process.

Ref.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4-hana-for-manufacturing-logistics-2310-support-of-kanban-with/ba-p/13578896

Currently when Kanban status is EMPTY meaning warehouse request is created. We want to use IN PROGRESS and IN TRANSIT as well if possible.

Please help with how to map this process in SAP EWM from WR (empty)-->Warehouse Task (in Progress) --??

 

Thank you in Advance,

Abhinay Waikar

entry.title: Available quantity for prod. XXXXXX is not sufficient Message No. /SCWM/L3682
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to post goods issue in outbound delivery in transaction /scwm/prdo where I am getting below error.

Available quantity for prod. 11001-269/0000 is not sufficient Message No. /SCWM/L3682

I have checked note 2389353 where I have not found any inconsistency. In my outbound process I am packing and adding packaging item in EWM using OPHU and PAC item category. 

Process without packaging item works smoothly. Please guide me for this issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Change Printer in RF EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

It looks like currently in SAP Public Cloud 2408, the only way to assign a user to a new printer is through OPD. This poses issues as many clients want to be able to change their printer assignment in a mobile transaction. 

Additionally, there are no API's released that allow the change the assignment of a print queue to printer.  Meaning, we cannot develop our own application. 

In EWM 2023 FPS01, there has a been a release to allow the change of a printer (see link below) in RF. By going to Resource Management, a new field of '03 Printer' has been added.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-extended-warehouse-management-in-sap-s-4hana-2023-fps01-private-cloud/ba-p/13620717

Unfortunately, it seems in Public Cloud there is no available option for this.  In OPD, we can assign a resource to a user's print queue. This print queue can then be assigned to a specific printer. Linking a resource to a mobile printer. However, we would also like to utilize the ability of assigning warehouse orders to pickers (resources) and not the resource itself. In addition, there is no ability to add resource group as a context data object in OPD.

 

So simply, my question is. Is there any other way of doing this?

entry.title: Position with item category OPHU in the EWM delivery remains in the ECC queue with the error.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m facing the following issue: In the decentralized EWM, we create a packing item (OPHU), which is supposed to update the delivery in ECC by adding the new item upon confirmation. However, the data record gets stuck in the queue (ECC inbound) with the error "Item 0020 does not exist."

What puzzles me is that the new items are not listed in NEW_ITEM_DATA but rather under ITEM_DATA.

Can anyone help with this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Getting error during reporting missing HU in PI process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We couldn"t be able to report missing HU via RF getting below error where bin having single HU and can be able to report missing HUs where Bin having more than one HU.

Error: Not all quants for product 51431704 were counted; no save possible (/SCWM/UI_PI026).

Regards,

Santhosh

entry.title: SAP EWM WAREHOUSE OBD KITS WITH MATERIAL VALUE
entry.content:
Hello Everyone 

Looking for a report to show OBDs for picked-not issued material but including the material value and the work order for each line . I can extract every material picked KIT OBD's through the warehouse monitor Outbound delivery but wasn't able to find any report showing both (work order number and material value for picked material ) not sure if there's one including both but will appreciate your help .

Thank you

entry.title: FM/BAPI for Stock data transfer in EWM
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

I would like to know the solution for EWM - Initial stock upload for warehouse including with/without handling units. 

I'm aware of the file upload approach in /SCWM/ISU t-code. However, we encountered performance issues while using this approach and it is taking a lot of time to create the documents as we have to extend for multiple warehouses and the data volume is huge.

As you already aware that we have to perform this activity during the black out phase only since it is a transactional data and the business shouldn't get impacted if its getting delayed.

Hence, I request you to suggest multiple options on how to proceed by considering all the pros and cons. Please let me know in case any standard FM/BAPIs/APIs that are available which meets our requirement to upload this data.

I look forward to hear more from you.

#EWM #SCWM/ISU

Thanks,

Vishwa

entry.title: Integration
entry.content:
Curious to understand how Transportation in the category of 5 PL to be integrated with SAP S/4 Hana in a real-time way ? 
Is there any live environment?
